title: Giacomo l'idealista
writer: Emilio De Marchi, Emilio Cecchi, Aldo Buzzi
actors: Massimo Serato, Marina Berti, Andrea Checchi
plot: Literary adaptation: A young professor fallen into poverty and an orphan girl who has become his fiancee find work in the mansion of an elderly count, whose son rapes the young woman, forcing the two lovers to separate for a time.
